description: Interesting accounts in Judaeo-Arabic, partly in the first person ("Friday: baṭṭāl. Sunday: I went out. . . "). Mentions 'ghilmān al-ṣāḥib', provender for a donkey and camel, and Avraham al-Parnas. On recto there are pen trials in Hebrew, including a few lines of poetry and the phrase 'my writing is wretched' (כתאבי מקארב).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
